name: MinIO (S3 Compatible Storage)
description: High-Performance Object Storage compatible with Amazon S3 APIs, complete with a visual Web Console.

aws.parity: MinIO speaks the S3 API, so buckets, objects and presigned URLs behave locally exactly as on real S3.
aws.deploy: Drop the custom endpoint from your AWS SDK config so the S3 client talks to real Amazon S3.

variables.label: S3 API Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to bind the MinIO S3 API.

variables.label: Web Console Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to bind the MinIO administration web console.

variables.label: Root User
variables.description: The root username to access MinIO.

variables.label: Root Password
variables.description: The root password to access MinIO.
